# scaleY

**Type Property**

A value function scales by the input value along the y-axis. Animations referencing this value function must provide a single animation value.

## Declaration

```swift
static let scaleY: CAValueFunctionName
```

## Constants

- **scale**: A value function scales by the input value along all three axis. Animations using this value transform function must provide animation values in an `NSArray` of three `NSNumber` instances that specify the (x, y, z) scale values.
- **scaleX**: A value function scales by the input value along the x-axis. Animations referencing this value transform function must provide a single animation value.
- **scaleZ**: A value function that scales by the input value along the z-axis. Animations referencing this value function must provide a single animation value.
